description: Sprawlmap — Franklin County public land and resource finder. Tool schema for LLM agents.

function.name: findPublicParcels
function.description: Find public/city-owned parcels near a location. Returns parcels with risk assessment. Use codes 640 (municipal) and 605 (land bank) are LOWEST risk. Code 650 (school district) is AVOID - active enforcement.

includeGeometry.description: Include polygon geometry for map display

function.name: findNearbyResources
function.description: Find nearby amenities via OpenStreetMap plus hardcoded Columbus resources: bus stops, laundromats, drinking water, charging stations, food banks, mental health, restrooms, shelters, libraries, hospitals, pharmacies.

function.name: scoreLocation
function.description: Score a location 0-100 for suitability against user needs. 40pts for public land availability + 60pts for needs met.

function.name: getParcelDetail
function.description: Get full parcel detail by PIN from Franklin County Auditor API.

function.name: geocode
function.description: Convert address or place name to lat/lon. Automatically biases to Columbus OH.

risk_levels.low: LUC 640 or 605 — City of Columbus or Land Bank. CPD trespass authorization required to arrest. Rarely filed proactively. SAFEST.
risk_levels.med: LUC 600-699 other — Other exempt public entities (county, state, township). Verify before use.
risk_levels.avoid: LUC 650 — School district. Active enforcement, trespass forms typically on file. DO NOT RECOMMEND.

luc_codes.605: Land Bank/CLRC — LOW risk — safe option

field_mapping.CLASSCD: Property class code (640, 605, etc.) — use this for filtering
